decision.summary: Hold the open April 12 70k dip position and do not add a new BTC trade.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor transcript from 2026-04-12 and recent summaries keep the active thesis bearish, still expecting continued downside and possibly one or two more lows, and Binance supports that with BTC at 70926.78, down 1.107% on the day and trading close to the 24h low. The only open position, `will-bitcoin-dip-to-70k-on-april-12` Yes, is a near-settled loser at 0.0005 probability, but the playbook disables stop-loss in this early-stage portfolio and it is nowhere near take-profit; the remaining active BTC markets are either the already-filled daily downside slot or extremely discounted/stale lines that do not offer a valid new edge.
